title: Mob's Drops
description: Makes Mobs Drops Everything In Their Inventory When They Die.
body:
With This Mod, You Will Finally Feel That Actually Something Special Happened When You Find A Zombie With Full Enchanted Golden Armor!
When A Mob Dies: It Drops Everyting In their inventory, including:

- -Main Hand

- -Off Hand

- -Head

- -Chest

- -Legs

- -Feet

Which Basically Is The Whole Inventory Of Every Mob That Is Able To Carry Stuff!

\*/ if you found any bugs, got any improvements ideas, please comment it \*/
